title: racosperma zatrichotum
intro: Racosperma zatrichotum, also known as the 'Hairy Wattle', is a species of plant in the family Fabaceae. The medicinal properties of Racosperma zatrichotum are derived from its bark, which has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of infections and reduce inflammation. Racosperma zatrichotum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion in herbal remedies.
